title: Canonicalize Bureau scheduler deployment sources
goal: Give the installed bureau_cycle stages and closure planner one versioned source of truth, immutable release identity and drift check while preserving compatibility with current unit names.

acceptance.assertion: Each installed cycle module, libexec shim and timer names one canonical repository path and immutable release identity.
Discovery, curator, operator, verifier and closure planner units are versioned or explicitly delegated to another canonical deployment repository.
A read-only check compares live unit and executable identities with the canonical release and reports mismatch without self-healing.
Any rename of bureau-halfhour-operator preserves a documented compatibility alias and rollback until consumers are migrated.
